title: Infinite loop causing out of memory issue
symptom: The workflow occasionally gets stuck in an infinite loop, leading to memory exhaustion and container shutdown. This happens intermittently during scheduled executions.
applies_when: Using a loop node to process large batches
root_cause: The loop node retains all data in memory for each iteration, which can accumulate and lead to out of memory (OOM) errors, especially when processing large batches over multiple executions.
fix_steps: Split the workflow to move the loop part into a sub-workflow
Ensure that each child execution releases memory after completion
agent_instruction: Refactor the workflow to use a sub-workflow for the loop processing.
